title: calibrachoa felipponei
intro: Calibrachoa felipponei, also known as the Dwarf Morning Glory, is a flowering plant species native to South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's leaves and flowers contain antioxidants and flavonoids, which have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Calibrachoa felipponei is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
